name: clash-verge-rev
title: Clash Verge Rev
description: Manage Clash Verge Rev subscriptions, proxy groups, and proxy modes
author: zh_chen

commands.name: manage-proxies
commands.title: Manage Proxies
commands.subtitle: Clash Proxy Groups
commands.description: View and switch proxy nodes in different rule groups

commands.name: manage-profiles
commands.title: Manage Subscriptions
commands.subtitle: Clash Subscriptions
commands.description: View, switch, and update subscription profiles

commands.name: view-logs
commands.title: View Logs
commands.subtitle: Clash Real-time Logs
commands.description: View Clash Verge Rev logs in real-time

commands.name: view-connections
commands.title: View Connections
commands.subtitle: Clash Active Connections
commands.description: View and manage active Clash connections

preferences.name: controllerPort
preferences.title: Controller Port
preferences.description: Mihomo external controller TCP port. On macOS, Unix socket is auto-detected first (see Controller Socket below).

preferences.name: secret
preferences.title: API Secret
preferences.description: Mihomo external controller secret (found in Clash Verge Rev settings)

preferences.name: controllerSocket
preferences.title: Controller Socket
preferences.description: macOS only: Mihomo Unix socket path. Auto-detected by default. Leave empty to use TCP port instead.

preferences.name: defaultSearchMode
preferences.title: Default Search Mode
preferences.description: Default search target in Manage Proxies. Use ':' prefix to search the other type.

preferences.name: defaultSortOrder
preferences.title: Default Sort Order
preferences.description: Default sorting method for View Connections.
